title: Magdeburg, Saxony-Anhalt — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Magdeburg, Saxony-Anhalt: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Magdeburg is a city in Saxony-Anhalt with a population of 237,000. The cathedral city on the Elbe, capital of Saxony-Anhalt, with a thousand-year history, Otto von Guericke’s legacy, and a growing tech sector.

Last updated: July 18, 2026
